solutionFiles.content:
from models.bug_task import BugTask
from models.feature_task import FeatureTask
from services.report_service import build_summary


def main():
    tasks = [
        BugTask("Fix login redirect", 3),
        FeatureTask("Add dark mode", 5),
    ]

    for line in build_summary(tasks):
        print(line)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

main() if False else None
# Leave the demo above in place.

# No edits are required here unless you want to inspect the demo flow.

# The grader checks the classes and service.

BugTask should be constructible with title and points.

BugTask instances should inherit title and points attributes.
BugTask.summary_line() should format the bug summary.
FeatureTask.summary_line() should format the feature summary.
Running the demo should print two summary lines.

solutionFiles.content:
from models.bug_task import BugTask
from models.feature_task import FeatureTask
from services.report_service import build_summary


def main():
    tasks = [
        BugTask("Fix login redirect", 3),
        FeatureTask("Add dark mode", 5),
    ]

    for line in build_summary(tasks):
        print(line)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
from services.storage_service import load_tasks
from services.report_service import build_summary


def main():
    task_rows = [
        {"type": "bug", "title": "Fix login redirect", "points": 3},
        {"type": "feature", "title": "Add dark mode", "points": 5},
    ]

    tasks = load_tasks(task_rows)
    for line in build_summary(tasks):
        print(line)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
from services.storage_service import load_tasks
from services.report_service import build_summary


def main():
    task_rows = [
        {"type": "bug", "title": "Fix login redirect", "points": 3},
        {"type": "feature", "title": "Add dark mode", "points": 5},
    ]

    tasks = load_tasks(task_rows)
    tasks[0].mark_done()

    for line in build_summary(tasks):
        print(line)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
from services.storage_service import load_tasks
from services.report_service import build_summary, total_points, done_count


def main():
    task_rows = [
        {"type": "bug", "title": "Fix login redirect", "points": 3},
        {"type": "feature", "title": "Add dark mode", "points": 5},
    ]

    tasks = load_tasks(task_rows)
    tasks[0].mark_done()

    for line in build_summary(tasks):
        print(line)

    print(f"Total points: {total_points(tasks)}")
    print(f"Done tasks: {done_count(tasks)}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
from services.storage_service import load_tasks
from services.report_service import build_summary, total_points, done_count, priority_breakdown


def main():
    task_rows = [
        {"type": "bug", "title": "Fix login redirect", "points": 3},
        {"type": "feature", "title": "Add dark mode", "points": 5},
    ]

    tasks = load_tasks(task_rows)
    tasks[0].mark_done()

    for line in build_summary(tasks):
        print(line)

    print(f"Total points: {total_points(tasks)}")
    print(f"Done tasks: {done_count(tasks)}")
    print(f"Priorities: {priority_breakdown(tasks)}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

FeatureTask should compute its own priority label.

semanticChecks.message: Feature summaries should include the priority label.
priority_breakdown should call the shared priority method on each task.
Running the demo should print summaries plus three report lines.
